MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY AZIZIANS, SARET AS TO DEFENDANT BURNING MAN PROJECT A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MOLLY VIKART, ADMINISTRATIVE SPECIALIST. FILED BY DEFENDANT BURNING MAN PROJECT A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF SARET AZIZIANS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BURNING MAN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MOLLY VIKART, ADMINISTRATIVE SPECIALIST. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT STATED IN COURT THAT THEIR CORRECT BUSINESS NAME IS 'BURNING MAN PROJECT' INSTEAD OF 'BURNING MAN'. COURT AMENDS DEFENDANT'S NAME TO BURNING MAN PROJECT, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION IN THE SYSTEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZIZIANS, SARET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BURNING MAN PROJECT A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
